plan: Create v3/ with further improvements: better context window management, tool chaining, parallel execution support, improved error recovery, and more sophisticated planning.
findings: v2 improvements: structured memory, reflection loops, robust parser, automated testing framework. Live benchmarks confirmed file creation, shell execution, nested directories, JSON files all work correctly.
version_info:
Running v2.0.0
Changes:
v2.0.0 Changes:
- Added planning module for task decomposition
- Added reflection loop for self-evaluation
- Structured memory system (working + long-term)
- Improved markdown parser with error recovery
- Retry mechanism for failed operations
- Token-aware context management
- Built-in testing framework
- Structured scratchpad with sections
- Better history compression with semantic summarization
